title: Iron Mend Fabric Maintenance Kit for Scuba Diving Wetsuit Drysuit Repair - Black
description:
Extend the life of neoprene gear and fix it when it rips using Tenacious Tape Neoprene Patch. Simply cut the 10”x6” patch to size and activate the adhesive using an iron to create a permanent repair for neoprene waders, wetsuits and more. Previously known as Iron Mend, this iron-on fabric patch kit can be used to reinforce seams and high-wear areas including elbows, knees and underarms. It’s also designed to repair other stretchy fabrics like spandex and Lycra. For larger repairs or gear that is hard to iron like gloves, booties, and spray skirts, choose the Wetsuit Repair Kit that includes Aquaseal NEO. This flexible, black contact cement cures permanently within 30 minutes. It also seals leaky gaskets and bonds to coated materials and even latex

Iron Mend Fabric Maintenance Kit for Scuba Diving Wetsuit Drysuit Repair - Black

Extend the life of neoprene gear and fix it when it rips using Tenacious Tape Neoprene Patch. Simply cut the 10”x6” patch to size and activate the adhesive using an iron to create a permanent repair for neoprene waders, wetsuits and more. Previously known as Iron Mend, this iron-on fabric patch kit can be used to reinforce seams and high-wear areas including elbows, knees and underarms. It’s also designed to repair other stretchy fabrics like spandex and Lycra. For larger repairs or gear that is hard to iron like gloves, booties, and spray skirts, choose the Wetsuit Repair Kit that includes Aquaseal NEO. This flexible, black contact cement cures permanently within 30 minutes. It also seals leaky gaskets and bonds to coated materials and even latex. For ultra-stretch repair that lasts, use Tenacious Tape Iron-On Neoprene Patch or Aquaseal NEO.

Key Features

  • Fix tears permanently in neoprene wetsuits, gloves and waders with just a household iron and this heat-activated Tenacious Tape Neoprene Patch
  • Cut the black, 10”x6” fabric patch to size, and repair tears or reinforce elbows, knees and high-wear areas that require lots of flexibility and durability; also compatible with stretch fabrics like spandex and Lycra®
  • Choose the complete Wetsuit Repair Kit, which includes the Iron-On Neoprene Patch with Aquaseal NEO Contact Cement (1.5 fl oz)
  • Repair torn or ripped neoprene permanently in 30 minutes using Aquaseal NEO; cures to a black, flexible rubber and bonds to latex
  • Packaging may vary

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 16110-02
  • UPC: 21563155983
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 10 x 6 in
